fields.label: Benefit Code
fields.description: Unique identifier code for programmatic use (e.g., COMMISSION_REDUCTION, PRIORITY_LISTING)

fields.label: Value
fields.description: Benefit value (e.g., 5 for 5% commission reduction, 100 for product limit)

fields.label: Value Type
fields.options:
Percentage
Fixed Amount
Count
Boolean
Text
Multiplier

fields.label: Is Active
fields.description: Whether this benefit is currently active

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Detailed description of the benefit for display to sellers

fields.label: Icon
fields.description: Icon name or class for display (e.g., fa-star, fa-chart-line)

fields.label: Display Order
fields.description: Order in which to display this benefit (lower numbers first)
